arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Juventus: Live stream, game time thread, how to watch
arts.sum: Bayern Munich takes on Juventus at home today, followed by a Frauen-Bundesliga match against Potsdam on Sunday and an away trip to face Arsenal FC next Wednesday. The FC Bayern Frauen return to UEFA Women’s Champions League action as the busy schedule to round up calendar year 2024 draws to a close.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'deliver Alphonso Davies ultimatum' as Bayern Munich 'continue contract talks' to keep left-back
arts.sum: Real Madrid reportedly set a deadline for Alphonso Davies to respond to their contract offer as they grow pessimistic in their pursuit of the Canada international.

arts.ttl: Jamal Musiala named Germany’s men’s player of the year for 2024
arts.sum: Bayern Munich midfielder Jamal Musiala has been named player of the year for the German men’s national team with 56% of the vote. The award was voted for by the…

arts.ttl: Kit Leak: Bayern Munich’s home, away, and third kit design details leaked
arts.sum: If the leaked information is true, it should not be too big a problem, since the 19/20 home kit looked quite dandy, although a lot of it could be because it was worn during a treble-winning season. Looks like there’s a lot of information on the future kits coming out.
